_comment: Copy to config.json and replace with your own values. The numbers and codes below are placeholders, not real commercial terms.

skip._comment: order_numbers: orders handled manually. line_prefixes: start-of-line matches dropping discount and coupon lines that are not real products - put your own promo codes and offer names here; an emoji or percentage prefix works too. line_contains: substrings anywhere in a line that mark the whole order for manual handling.
